source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed., 2021) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Topic-router for ambiguous-role D2 lead-measure queries. Tests cover EN/JP/zh-TW. Activation criterion = ambiguous on role (solo / leader-facilitator / member-influencer) per description.

test_cases.prompt: Help me with lead measures. I have the goal but no idea where to start.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. No role marker — could be solo picking own leads, leader facilitating team, or member working with inherited leads. Router asks ONE Socratic question on role then routes.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches EN signal 'Help me with lead measures' literally cited in description

test_cases.prompt: lead measure の探し方を教えてください。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. JP query 'lead measure の探し方' without role signal. Router disambiguates (solo / leader-facilitator / member-influencer) before any D2 protocol.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches JP signal 「lead measure の探し方」 literally cited in description

test_cases.prompt: 幫我找 lead measure，每天到底該做什麼才會推動目標？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. zh-TW query with no role marker. Router should ask the role question (solo / leader 帶 team / member 接收已訂好的) then route.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches zh-TW signal 「幫我找 lead measure」「每天該做什麼才會推動目標」 in description

test_cases.prompt: What's a daily action driver for an already-defined goal? Need leading-indicator advice.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. 'Daily action driver' / 'leading-indicator advice' is described as trigger phrasing. No role named. Router disambiguates.
test_cases.notes: positive: description lists 'Daily action that drives the goal' / 'Lead measure advice' as EN trigger; role unclear

test_cases.prompt: Help me facilitate my team picking 2-3 lead measures for our Team WIG (currently 0 → 30% by Dec).
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. Role explicit (leader-facilitator). Fire 4dx-d2-lead-measures directly.
test_cases.notes: lure: explicit-role (leader facilitating team) — description excludes role-explicit cases

test_cases.prompt: Our team's lead measures are set. How should I display them on the scoreboard?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. Topic is wrong — query is D3 scoreboard, not D2 lead-measure discovery. Route to 4dx-d3-scoreboard topic-router.
test_cases.notes: lure: wrong-stage — surface 'lead measures' word present but downstream D3 question

test_cases.prompt: I haven't set my goal yet — what's a good lead measure for general productivity?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. WIG prerequisite missing. Description explicitly excludes pre-WIG queries; route to 4dx-d1-wig-formulation first.
test_cases.notes: lure: D2 prerequisite missing — leads built on no-WIG are noise

test_cases.prompt: 我是 team lead，但我老闆要我先自己想 2-3 個 lead 候選再帶 team 討論。算 solo 還是 facilitator？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. Edge case: leader doing pre-work before facilitating — between solo-discovery and facilitation. Router should surface this and likely route to team-lead-measure-facilitation (since the eventual venue is the team session, and the book's anti-pattern is 'leader pre-writes leads to save team time'). Should warn user about veto-not-dictate principle even if they prepare candidates.
test_cases.notes: boundary: leader-doing-pre-work — sits between personal-discovery and team-facilitation; correctly disambiguated by surfacing the team-build risk

self_evaluation_note: All 8 cases reviewed against description-only activation. 4 should_trigger genuinely role-ambiguous (EN/JP/zh-TW + EN paraphrase); 3 should_not_trigger lures (role explicit / wrong-stage D3 / wrong-stage D1 prerequisite) correctly excluded. Edge case forces router to surface the leader-pre-work tension and route to team-facilitation while flagging veto-not-dictate. Description boundary clauses ('Do NOT activate when role is explicit / WIG not yet defined / scoreboard / cadence') align with all 4 should_not lures.
